_readme: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values. These match the Valves in the Open WebUI function. Never commit config.json to git — it contains secrets.
_gateway_url_notes: If Open WebUI and OpenClaw are in the same Docker network, use the container name as the hostname
_gateway_token_notes: Keep it blank if not needed
It looks like a random 32-character string
_device_id_notes: It is a long hex string (64 characters)
_private_key_b64_notes: Paste ONLY the base64 content — not the BEGIN/END header lines
The Function already adds the ---Begin---End--- part
The pipe accepts bare base64 or a full PEM block — either works
_public_key_b64_notes: Paste ONLY the base64 content — not the BEGIN/END header lines
_timeout_connect_notes: Seconds to wait for the auth handshake. Default 15 is fine for local Docker.
_timeout_response_notes: Seconds to wait for the agent to reply. Increase if your model is slow.
